title: 中文简历
text: 陈宇城，男，2003年12月出生，华中科技大学机械科学与工程学院机械设计制造及其自动化（机器人方向）本科在读，预计2026年6月毕业。已保送至上海交通大学控制科学与工程专业攻读硕士研究生，将于2026年9月入学。

title: 中文简历
text:
实习经历

速腾聚创(Robosense)

强化学习算法实习生 | 2025.12.10 - 至今

项目描述：网球接打小车的强化学习模型训练与部署
主要工作：

强化学习模型训练：在Isaac Gym训练环境下，基于rsl_rl强化学习库实现PPO算法，训练小车完成网球接打自动控制任务。
Sim2Sim Gap研究：将模型从Isaac Gym训练环境迁移到Mujoco仿真环境，验证模型在不同仿真环境下的表现，实现跨环境泛化能力。
Real2Sim Gap研究：将模型从虚拟训练环境部署到真实物理环境并进行验证，验证模型在真实环境下的表现。
奖励函数设计：基于真实环境反馈设计奖励函数，引导模型学习控制策略，提升小车的接球成功率。

title: 中文简历
text:
主要项目经历

基于强化学习(PPO)的自适应MPC控制器
项目负责人｜ 2025.12 – 至今 项目描述：结合强化学习与模型预测控制(MPC)技术，提升无人机在复杂环境下的飞行鲁棒性，尤其针对定位信息受干扰的场景
本人负责任务：
1. 算法融合：将Actor-Critic强化学习算法与MPC控制器相结合，利用强化学习自适应调整MPC的代价函数，增强系统对环境变化的适应能力。
2. 模型训练：采用PPO算法并使用MLP网络结构构建Actor-Critic模型，进行强化学习训练。
3. 可微分MPC：采用可微分MPC的框架，将MPC的优化过程纳入强化学习的训练流程中。
4. C++与python融合：使用C++实现可微分MPC控制器加入到强化学习的训练中(python)，提高训练与模型推理效率。


风扰动下无人机目标搜索+投放
项目负责人｜2024.05 – 2024.10
项目描述：室外环境下，使无人机载重（一个1.5L矿泉水瓶）在8m80m的跑道上自主飞行，实现以下任务：
1. 无人机在指定起飞点自主起飞
2. 在距离起飞点30m远的85m区域内寻找白桶进行投放，白桶共三个（直径分别为30, 20,15），直径越小分值越高
3. 在距离起飞点65m远的8*5区域内侦查危险物，并远程传送数据，由参赛人员在控制台填写
4. 完成以上任务后无人机自主飞回起飞点并降落
本人负责任务：
1. 模糊PID控制器编写(C++)：通过模糊规则⾃适应调整PID系数，实现⻛扰动下⽆⼈机精准控制
2. 编写路径规划算法VFH：依据VFH算法求解当前可⾏点，并通过B样条曲线优化出光滑路径
3. 部署滤波算法：通过卡尔曼滤波以及低通滤波器，实现对噪声的滤除作用，使控制器平滑输出


障碍物森林中的快递无人机
项目负责人｜2023.10 – 2024.05
项目描述：室内环境下，使无人机载重（3个100g快递盒）在1010m的区域执行任务，具体任务如下：
1. 在起飞点自主起飞
2. 在108.5m的区域中寻找存在的5个标靶进行投放，投放得分由投放准确度与标靶自身权重计算，同时注意躲避该区域内的密集障碍物
3. 执行完任务2后，前往10*1.5m的长廊入口，穿越长廊抵达降落点准确降落，其中长廊中存在两个80cm宽的窄道
本人负责任务：
1. Ubuntu下编写基于ROS的⻜⾏代码(C++)：执⾏障碍森林、狭窄⾛廊环境下避障任务及投放任务
2. 部署FAST-LIO及避障算法Ego-Planner : ⽆⼈机定位并⽣成可⾏路线，MPC控制器跟踪路径避障
3. 编写MPC控制器(C++)：依据目标点与约束条件在线计算对⽆⼈机加速度的控制，以跟踪全局路径

title: Project Outcome Presentation
text:
Project Leader｜ 2025.12 – now  Project Description:
Combined reinforcement learning with model predictive control technology to enhance UAV flight robustness in complex environments, especially for scenarios with disturbed positioning information. Integrated Actor-Critic reinforcement learning algorithm with MPC controller, using reinforcement learning to adaptively adjust the cost function of MPC, enhancing the system’s ability to adapt to environmental changes. Conducted reinforcement learning training using PPO algorithm, constructing Actor-Critic models with MLP network structure. Adopted differentiable MPC framework, incorporating MPC’s optimization process into the reinforcement learning training pipeline. Implemented differentiable MPC controller in C++ and integrated it into reinforcement learning training (Python), improving training and model inference efficiency.
Technologies Used:Python, C++, PyTorch, Differentiable MPC, Reinforcement Learning (PPO)

title: Project Outcome Presentation
text:
Project Leader｜ 2025.12 – now  Project Description:
Combined reinforcement learning with model predictive control technology to enhance UAV flight robustness in complex environments, especially for scenarios with disturbed positioning information. Integrated Actor-Critic reinforcement learning algorithm with MPC controller, using reinforcement learning to adaptively adjust the cost function of MPC, enhancing the system’s ability to adapt to environmental changes. Conducted reinforcement learning training using PPO algorithm, constructing Actor-Critic models with MLP network structure. Adopted differentiable MPC framework, incorporating MPC’s optimization process into the reinforcement learning training pipeline. Implemented differentiable MPC controller in C++ and integrated it into reinforcement learning training (Python), improving training and model inference efficiency.
Technologies Used:Python, C++, PyTorch, Differentiable MPC, Reinforcement Learning (PPO)

title: Project Outcome Presentation
section: Decentralized Multi-Robot Ergodic Planning for Exploration of Unknown Dynamic Environments(RSS 2026 in the pipeline)
text:
Decentralized Multi-Robot Ergodic Planning for Exploration of Unknown Dynamic Environments(RSS 2026 in the pipeline)
First Author｜2025.09 – 2026.02
Project Description:
Deployed distributed multi-UAVs for cooperative search in an information map, aligning UAV trajectories with information distribution to acquire more information. Implemented frequency domain-based coverage search algorithm and ensured multi-UAV connectivity through probability-based path planning.  Technologies Used:ROS, iLQR Trajectory Optimization, Python/C++, Gazebo

title: Project Outcome Presentation
text:
Wind-Disturbed UAV Target Search & Delivery
Project Leader｜2024.05 – 2024.10
 Project Description: Outdoor environment: UAV carrying a 1.5L mineral water bottle autonomously flew on an 8m80m runway, performing the following tasks: 1. UAV autonomously took off from the designated takeoff point.
2. Searched for white barrels for delivery in an 85m area 30m away from the takeoff point, with three white barrels (diameters: 30, 20, 15 cm) - smaller diameter barrels scored higher.
3. Reconnoitered dangerous objects in an 8*5 area 65m away from the takeoff point and remotely transmitted data for team members to fill in at the console.
4. After completing the above tasks, UAV autonomously returned to the takeoff point and landed.
Technologies Used:C++, Fuzzy PID Control, VFH Path Planning, Kalman Filtering

title: Project Outcome Presentation
section: 3rd University Intelligent Robot Creativity Competition - UAV Group A Competition
text:
3rd University Intelligent Robot Creativity Competition - UAV Group A Competition
Project Leader｜ 2024.05 – 2024.8





UAV Competition



Project Description:
Participated in the UAV Group A Competition, focusing on autonomous flight tasks with obstacle avoidance and target recognition. Developed robust flight control algorithms for UAVs in dynamic environments and implemented real-time obstacle detection and avoidance using sensor fusion.
Technologies Used:ROS, Computer Vision, C++, VFH Path Planning

title: Project Outcome Presentation
text:
Obstacle Forest Express Delivery UAV
Project Leader｜2023.10 – 2024.05
 Project Description: Indoor environment: UAV carrying 3×100g express boxes performed tasks in a 10×10m area, with the following specific tasks:
1. Autonomously took off from the takeoff point.
2. Searched for 5 existing targets in a 10×8.5m area for delivery, with delivery scores calculated based on delivery accuracy and target weights, while avoiding dense obstacles in the area.
3. After completing task 2, proceeded to the entrance of a 10×1.5m corridor, traversed the corridor to reach the landing point for accurate landing, with two 80cm-wide narrow passages in the corridor.
Technologies Used:ROS, FAST-LIO, Ego-Planner, MPC Controller, C++

text:
未知动态环境下的去中心化多机器人遍历规划探索(RSS 2026在投)
第一作者｜2025.09 – 2026.02
项目描述：
部署分布式多无人机在一个信息地图中进行协同搜索，使无人轨迹分布对齐地图的信息分布，以获取更多信息。实现了基于频域分析的覆盖搜索算法，并通过基于概率的路径规划确保多机连通性。  技术栈：ROS, iLQR 轨迹优化, Python/C++, Gazebo

title: Yucheng Chen
text:
Internship

2025.12.10 - Present

Robosense | Reinforcement Learning Algorithm Intern

Project: Tennis Ball-catching Cart Reinforcement Learning Model Training and Deployment
Main Work:

Reinforcement Learning Model Training: Implemented PPO algorithm based on rsl_rl reinforcement learning library in Isaac Gym training environment to train the cart for tennis ball-catching automatic control
Cross-environment Model Migration: Conducted Sim2Sim Gap research, migrating models from Isaac Gym training environment to Mujoco simulation environment to verify model performance in different simulation environments
Virtual to Real Environment Transfer: Conducted Real2Sim Gap research, deploying models from virtual training environment to real physical environment for verification
Reward Function Design: Designed reward functions based on real-world environment feedback to guide models in learning control strategies

title: Yucheng Chen
text:
Project Experience

Adaptive MPC Controller Based on Reinforcement Learning (PPO)
Project Leader｜2025.12 – now
Project Description：Combine reinforcement learning with model predictive control technology to enhance UAV flight robustness in complex environments, especially for scenarios with disturbed positioning information
Key Contributions：
1. Algorithm Integration：Integrated Actor-Critic reinforcement learning algorithm with MPC controller, using reinforcement learning to adaptively adjust the cost function of MPC, enhancing the system’s ability to adapt to environmental changes
2. Model Training：Conducted reinforcement learning training using PPO algorithm, constructing Actor-Critic models with MLP network structure
3. Differentiable MPC：Adopted differentiable MPC framework, incorporating MPC’s optimization process into the reinforcement learning training pipeline
4. C++ and Python Integration：Implemented differentiable MPC controller in C++ and integrated it into reinforcement learning training (Python), improving training and model inference efficiency


Wind-Disturbed UAV Target Search and Delivery
Project Leader｜2024.05 – 2024.10
Project Description：Outdoor environment: UAV carrying a 1.5L mineral water bottle autonomously flew on an 8m80m runway, performing the following tasks:
1. UAV autonomously took off from the designated takeoff point
2. Searched for white barrels for delivery in an 85m area 30m away from the takeoff point, with three white barrels (diameters: 30, 20, 15 cm) - smaller diameter barrels scored higher
3. Reconnoitered dangerous objects in an 8*5 area 65m away from the takeoff point and remotely transmitted data for team members to fill in at the console
4. After completing the above tasks, UAV autonomously returned to the takeoff point and landed
Key Contributions：
1. Fuzzy PID Controller (C++): Implemented fuzzy rules to adaptively adjust PID coefficients for precise control of UAVs under wind disturbances
2. Path Planning Algorithm VFH: Solved current feasible points based on VFH algorithm and generated smooth paths through B-spline curve optimization
3. Filter Algorithm Deployment: Combined Kalman filter and low-pass filter to remove noise and smooth controller output


Obstacle Forest Express Delivery UAV
Project Leader｜2023.10 – 2024.05
Project Description：Indoor environment: UAV carrying 3×100g express boxes performed tasks in a 10×10m area, including:
1. Autonomous takeoff from the takeoff point
2. Searching for 5 existing targets in a 10×8.5m area for delivery, with delivery scores calculated based on delivery accuracy and target weights, while avoiding dense obstacles in the area
3. After completing task 2, proceeding to the entrance of a 10×1.5m corridor, traversing the corridor to reach the landing point for accurate landing, with two 80cm-wide narrow passages in the corridor
Key Contributions：
1. ROS-based Flight Code (C++): Implemented obstacle avoidance and delivery tasks in obstacle forest and narrow corridor environments
2. Localization and Path Generation: Deployed FAST-LIO and Ego-Planner for UAV localization and feasible route generation, with MPC controller tracking paths for obstacle avoidance
3. MPC Controller (C++): Computed control inputs for UAV acceleration online based on target points and constraints to track global paths

title: Yucheng Chen

Robotics Fundamentals: Mastered IK (Inverse Kinematics), rotation matrices, quaternions, etc.
